Title: Cosm Studios

Cosm Studios OVERVIEW CATALOG We Are Stars What are we made of? Where did it all come from? Get A Quote Narrated by Andy Serkis, music by Rhian Sheehan. 

Explore the secrets of our cosmic chemistry, and our explosive origins. Connect life on Earth to the evolution of the Universe by following the formation of Hydrogen atoms to the synthesis of Carbon, and the molecules for life.

With expert input from leading scientists, cosmologists, astrophysicists, astro-chemists, planetary scientists and astro-biologists we present humanity's current understanding of where everything
